problem_statement: Independent consultants lose follow-up tasks after client calls and messy notes.
target_market: Independent consultants and small agencies handling multiple client threads each week.
offered_solution: An AI workflow assistant that turns meeting notes into a reviewable action list.
validation_goal: Test whether workflow pain feels strong enough for a lightweight follow-up product.
landing_page_text: Turn messy follow-up into a clean action list without another heavy admin workflow.
mvp_scope: Upload notes, extract tasks, and review the suggested next actions.
concierge_mvp_idea: Founder manually reviews notes and returns an action list within two hours.
assumptions: Users feel enough follow-up pain to try a new tool.
A lightweight AI workflow feels easier than current manual habits.
A low-cost subscription becomes acceptable after visible value.
constraints: No deep integrations in the first version.
known_risks: Users may worry about client data handling.
